attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SCMTRL.LINE_ID,
SCMTRL.HEADER_ID,
SCMTRL.LINE_NUMBER,
SCMTRL.ORGANIZATION_ID,
SCMTRL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SCMTRL.REVISION,
SCMTRL.FROM_SUBINVENTORY_CODE, 
SCMTRL.FROM_LOCATOR_ID,
SCMTRL.TO_SUBINVENTORY_CODE, 
SCMTRL.TO_LOCATOR_ID,
SCMTRL.TO_ACCOUNT_ID, 
SCMTRL.LOT_NUMBER,
SCMTRL.SERIAL_NUMBER_START,
SCMTRL.SERIAL_NUMBER_END,
SCMTRL.UOM_CODE,
SCMTRL.QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.QUANTITY_DELIVERED, 
SCMTRL.QUANTITY_DETAILED,
SCMTRL.DATE_REQUIRED, 
SCMTRL.REASON_ID,
SCMTRL.REFERENCE,
SCMTRL.REFERENCE_TYPE_CODE, 
SCMTRL.REFERENCE_ID,
SCMTRL.PROJECT_ID,
SCMTRL.TASK_ID, 
SCMTRL.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
SCMTRL.LINE_STATUS,
SCMTRL.STATUS_DATE, 
SCMTRL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCMTRL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
SCMTRL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SCMTRL.CREATED_BY,
SCMTRL.CREATION_DATE,
SCMTRL.REQUEST_ID, 
SCMTRL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
SCMTRL.PROGRAM_ID,
SCMTRL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE3, 
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE5,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE9, 
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE10,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE11,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE12, 
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE13,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE14,
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE15, 
SCMTRL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SCMTRL.TXN_SOURCE_ID,
SCMTRL.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
SCMTRL.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_DETAIL_ID,
SCMTRL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID, 
SCMTRL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,
SCMTRL.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, 
SCMTRL.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
SCMTRL.PUT_AWAY_STRATEGY_ID, 
SCMTRL.PICK_STRATEGY_ID,
SCMTRL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,
SCMTRL.UNIT_NUMBER,
SCMTRL.REFERENCE_DETAIL_ID, 
SCMTRL.ASSIGNMENT_ID,
SCMTRL.FROM_COST_GROUP_ID, 
SCMTRL.TO_COST_GROUP_ID,
SCMTRL.LPN_ID,
SCMTRL.TO_LPN_ID,
SCMTRL.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER, 
SCMTRL.PICK_SLIP_DATE,
SCMTRL.FROM_SUBINVENTORY_ID, 
SCMTRL.TO_SUBINVENTORY_ID,
SCMTRL.INSPECTION_STATUS, 
SCMTRL.PICK_METHODOLOGY_ID,
SCMTRL.CONTAINER_ITEM_ID, 
SCMTRL.CARTON_GROUPING_ID,
SCMTRL.BACKORDER_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, 
SCMTRL.WMS_PROCESS_FLAG,
SCMTRL.SHIP_SET_ID,
SCMTRL.SHIP_MODEL_ID, 
SCMTRL.MODEL_QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.CROSSDOCK_TYPE,
SCMTRL.REQUIRED_QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.GRADE_CODE,
SCMTRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_DELIVERED, 
SCMTRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_DETAILED,
SCMTRL.SECONDARY_REQUIRED_QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, 
SCMTRL.WIP_ENTITY_ID,
SCMTRL.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
SCMTRL.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, 
SCMTRL.WIP_SUPPLY_TYPE,
SCMTRL.GLOBAL_NAME ,
 SCMTRL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE  ,                       
SCMTRL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,                    
SCMTRL.REFRESH_DATETIME ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES SCMTRL
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER NMO
WHERE  SCMTRL.HEADER_ID=NMO.SK_HEADER_ID_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_MOVE_ORDER_LINE WMOL  WHERE SCMTRL.LINE_ID=WMOL.SK_LINE_ID_INT
AND ITEM_KEY <>  -997 )

SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SSD.LINE_ID) + MAX_VAL MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SSD.LINE_ID AS SK_LINE_ID_INT
FROM  
 (
 SELECT COALESCE (MAX (MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MOVE_ORDER_LINE) SSDO,
(SELECT SSSED.LINE_ID
          FROM (
          SELECT LINE_ID,HEADER_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES SCMTRL
           UNION 
          SELECT LINE_ID,HEADER_ID,ORGANIZATION_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES  ECMTRL
                        ) SSSED
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER NMO
ON SSSED.HEADER_ID=NMO.SK_HEADER_ID_INT
) SSD
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MOVE_ORDER_LINE  SMOL WHERE SMOL.SK_LINE_ID_INT = SSD.LINE_ID )

SELECT 
SMOL.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
COALESCE(SSED.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER,0) AS PICK_SLIP_NUM_INT ,
SSED.PICK_SLIP_DATE AS PICK_DTM,
COALESCE(SSED.QUANTITY,0)  AS MOVE_ORDER_LINE_QTY,
SSED.LINE_ID AS SK_LINE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NMO.BK_REQUEST_NUM,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_MOVE_ORDER_REQUEST_NUM ,
COALESCE(NMO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,-999) AS MOVE_ORDER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
COALESCE(NIIT.ITEM_KEY,SOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-997)  AS ITEM_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NMOL.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT 
SCMTRL.LINE_ID,
SCMTRL.HEADER_ID,
SCMTRL.ORGANIZATION_ID,
SCMTRL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SCMTRL.QUANTITY,
SCMTRL.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER,
SCMTRL.PICK_SLIP_DATE,
SCMTRL.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SCMTRL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES SCMTRL
UNION 
SELECT
ECMTRL.LINE_ID,
ECMTRL.HEADER_ID,
ECMTRL.ORGANIZATION_ID,
ECMTRL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ECMTRL.QUANTITY,
ECMTRL.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER,
ECMTRL.PICK_SLIP_DATE,
ECMTRL.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_ID,
ECMTRL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES ECMTRL WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  ) SSED
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MOVE_ORDER_LINE SMOL
ON SSED.LINE_ID=SMOL.SK_LINE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER NMO
ON SSED.HEADER_ID=NMO.SK_HEADER_ID_INT
LEFT  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
ON SSED.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND SSED.ORGANIZATION_ID=NIIT.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT 
LEFT JOIN  (SELECT ELT1.LINE_ID, ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME, ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID ,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT2
ON  COALESCE(ELT1.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT1.LINE_ID) = ELT2.LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC'
WHEN  ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID, ELT2.LINE_ID) 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
) SOL
ON SOL.LINE_ID = SSED.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_ID                    
AND SOL.GLOBAL_NAME = SSED.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER_LINE NMOL
ON SSED.LINE_ID=NMOL.SK_LINE_ID_INT
